algaware 0.1.0
  • Reference

Call the Gemini API (OpenAI-compatible endpoint)

Source: R/llm.R
call_gemini.Rd

Uses Google's OpenAI-compatible chat completions endpoint. Includes a rate-limit delay to stay within the free tier (5 RPM for Pro, 15 RPM for Flash). On 429 responses, waits and retries up to 3 times with increasing backoff.

Usage

call_gemini(
  system_prompt,
  user_prompt,
  model = llm_model_name("gemini"),
  temperature = 0.3
)

Arguments

system_prompt

System prompt string.

user_prompt

User prompt string.

model

Gemini model name (default: "gemini-2.5-pro").

temperature

Sampling temperature (default: 0.3).

Value

Character string with the generated text.
